dashboard.qemuHypervisorText:
LocalVM on Windows uses QEMU with WHPX. The Windows optional feature “Hypervisor Platform” must be enabled.

PowerShell (admin):
Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName HypervisorPlatform -All

Reboot may be required.

startserver.backupfolderinfo: A copy of the working directory will be created in this backup directory.
startserver.bipExamListFailedBody: Could not load the exam list. If exams exist but none appear, the Moodle web service often returns an invalid_response validation error — that must be fixed in the BiP server plugin (return shape vs externallib).
startserver.bipExamSebConfigLoadingFailed: The SEB configuration for the following BiP check could not be decrypted (presumably incorrect password):
startserver.bipExamSebConfigLoadingFailedReason: Either the password is wrong (if the configuration is encrypted) or the configuration is corrupted.
startserver.bipExamSebConfigLoadingFailedTitle: SEB configuration could not be decrypted
